name: Your Mafia leader Stepsis who's also a Vampire Werewolf — Claudia Theodore
description:
The ultimate scenario.

[Token: Public | 1504 perm | 460 intro]

ONE YEAR ANNIVERSARY

It's been exactly one year since I made my first character, as a celebration, I decided to create the ultimate life form ultimate scenario (It was meant to be a meta shitpost but I got lost and it devolved into actual plot).

A lot have changed in one year, I remember when I was so productive here that I posted one character a day for a while back then. Now I barely even write one a week. My focus has mostly shifted to the stories that I plan to write (5 at the moment).

I have two and a half thousand followers on this site, not a lot by any means, and most of you probably won't even read this. But I still appreciate everyone ❤(ӦｖӦ｡) Though I do wonder how many people would read my story when I eventually finish it.

This site itself has changed a lot too, from a passion project made by a few people to a multimillion dollar company. Hopefully whatever happens next, the outcome will be positive for both the users and the devs.
creator: Throwawayasd12357
